title: Passport Application 护照办理
scene: 在护照办理中心申请护照

lines.en: Good afternoon. Are you here to apply for a passport?
lines.zh: 下午好。您是来申请护照的吗？

lines.en: Yes, it's my first time applying.
lines.zh: 是的，这是我第一次申请。

lines.en: Please fill out this form and provide proof of citizenship.
lines.zh: 请填写这张表格并提供公民身份证明。

lines.en: I have my birth certificate and driver's license with me.
lines.zh: 我带了我的出生证明和驾照。

lines.en: Perfect. Do you have your passport photo ready?
lines.zh: 很好。您准备好护照照片了吗？

lines.en: Yes, I took one at the photo booth earlier.
lines.zh: 是的，我早些时候在拍照亭拍了。

lines.en: Good. The fee is one hundred and thirty dollars.
lines.zh: 好的。费用是一百三十美元。

lines.en: Here's the payment. How long will it take to process?
lines.zh: 这是费用。办理需要多长时间？

lines.en: About six to eight weeks. We'll mail it to your address.
lines.zh: 大约六到八周。我们会寄到您的地址。

lines.en: Thank you. I really appreciate your help.
lines.zh: 谢谢。非常感谢您的帮助。
